tests.name: init_sh_exits_zero
tests.details: init.sh not driven; fell back to manual scaffolding (heredoc fragility, see documentation_gaps)

tests.name: context7_detection
tests.details: Context7 plugin detected via is_context7_mcp_registered (host has plugin enabled)

tests.name: stop_checklist_registered
tests.details: No script named stop-checklist.sh exists in framework — actual init.sh registers session-end-qdrant-reminder.sh in Stop hook (runbook expectation outdated)

documentation_gaps.gap: init.sh has no scriptable mode for UAT; heredoc driver fragile (~25 conditional prompts including dynamic platform/language enumeration)
Runbook references stop-checklist.sh hook but no such script exists in framework; init.sh registers session-end-qdrant-reminder.sh

tests.name: baseline_phase_state_advanced
tests.details: current_phase=2 with gates phase_0_to_1 and phase_1_to_2 marked approved

tests.name: baseline_feature_recorded
tests.details: build-progress.json features_completed includes uat-feat-baseline; process-state.json build_loop has all 6 steps

tests.name: baseline_committed
tests.details: git commit succeeded (no pre-commit hook firing as we ran git directly, not through Claude PreToolUse)

tests.name: phase_state_preserved
tests.details: current_phase=2 and project=uat-agent-84 unchanged across upgrade

tests.name: new_required_artifacts_listed
tests.details: Post-upgrade validation enumerated PRODUCT_MANIFESTO.md, PROJECT_BIBLE.md, CHANGELOG.md as missing-but-expected artifacts for production

tests.name: pending_approval_sentinel_respected
tests.details: FAILURE: with .claude/pending-approval.json present and a fresh poc_mode=sponsored_poc reset, --to-production proceeded through entire upgrade including a git commit. Sentinel was not consulted at all.

tests.name: upgrade_changelog_present_in_script
tests.details: scripts/upgrade-project.sh lines 12 and 16 reference BL-006 and BL-015 in changelog header

tests.name: poc_mode_removed
tests.details: .claude/phase-state.json poc_mode field removed (jq returned null) after --to-production

tests.name: track_preserved_when_higher_than_default_target
tests.details: Verified in clean-state debug run: full track preserved when --to-production runs (default target standard is below full so CURRENT_TRACK kept)

framework_bugs.reproduction: Initialize a sponsored_poc project, write a valid .claude/pending-approval.json (question/options/recommendation/offered_at), then run scripts/upgrade-project.sh --to-production
framework_bugs.expected: Per runbook 'pending_approval_sentinel_respected': upgrade refuses or warns rather than blasting through. The script header explicitly references BL-015 in its changelog, implying it should honor the sentinel.
framework_bugs.actual: Upgrade proceeds end-to-end including writing files and creating a git commit; no check or warning about pending-approval.json. grep -n pending-approval scripts/upgrade-project.sh shows only the changelog comment lines 17-18, no runtime check.

documentation_gaps.gap: upgrade-project.sh changelog comment claims BL-015 was 'picked up' by upgrade but the script itself does not gate on pending-approval.json

tests.name: no_uncommitted_secrets
tests.details: Refined grep for '(password|api[_-]?key|secret|token)\s*=\s*["'][^"']{6,}["']' returned zero hits in committed project files (excluded framework reference docs)

tests.name: log_files_consistent
tests.details: N/A — no FORCE/reset events occurred; .claude/process-audit.log absent as expected

summary: Upgrade from sponsored_poc to production succeeded end-to-end with state preservation; one Medium bug found (BL-015 sentinel ignored by upgrade script) and two doc gaps (init.sh non-scriptable, stop-checklist.sh hook expectation outdated).
